title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.3 — MODULE WIDTHS: COMPRESS is now the widest (4/10 of the row), GRIT and AMBER are EQUAL width (3/10 each) — was COMPRESS 2u / GRIT 2u / AMBER 1u. Matches the mockup: outboard widest, the two color modules the same size. Pure width-split change on top of the v0.4.2 uniform grid; DSP untouched. VERIFY: GRIT and AMBER read as the same size, COMPRESS wider. Next: move GRIT SPEED/CAL/BIAS/AGE/LFO into TWEAK, AMBER vertical stage-tags, raise the bottom section under COMPRESS/GRIT.
